title: <div>3. **`a-recursive-root`** → Processes recursive relationships across layers
content:
3. **`a-recursive-root`** → Processes recursive relationships across layers
4. **`reverse-engine-recursive-run`** → Reverse-engineers concepts back to source
5. **`tab-bookmark-manager`** → AI-powered content analysis (adapt for archives)
6. **`public-record-data-scrapper`** → Adapt to scrape/index archive files
7. **`a-context7`** → Generate context for AI from archive material
8. **`jvpiter-inquiry-labors`** → Research and analysis on archive data

### **New Connections to Make:**
```
Archive Files
↓
tab-bookmark-manager (AI analysis)
↓
semantic-archive-indexer (your new tool)
↓
primordial-synthesis-engine (master catalog)
↓
auto-revision-epistemic-engine (orchestration)
↓
solve-et-coagula (transformation)
↓
Output to personal repos (testing)
↓
Graduate to org repos (production)
↓
Feed insights back to AI contexts
↓
Resurface archive material for new iterations
